title: The Objects of Love
overview: Luz emigrated to Italy in search of a better future. In Colombia she has left his two years son by his family. But her European dream begins to truncate and turn into a series of misfortunes. She assumes her new social status and start from scratch, working in the cleaning sector. Until unexpectedly she meet Fran, a person who breaks all schemes. Luz and Fran decided to own their own lives, with the world ahead, and Rome at their feet.

trailers.title: Los objetos amorosos | Trailer | D'A 2017
trailers.channel_name: D'A - Festival de Cinema de Barcelona
